mechanics.excerpt: Each major armed force relies on one or more military acade mies t0 produce these valuable personnel, usually requiring minimum service commitment of four t0 six years_ Private acad emies exist throughout the Inner Sphere_ but tuition is often exorbitant: Admission to ay of these academies very Com petitive At the end of the course of study: graduates receive degree and military commission: Though academy graduates aremuch sought-after; tney make up the minority of MechWarriors and aerospace pilots_ most of whom enter a apprenticeship program.
